title: Media Intake
description: Reviewer-attached or operator-staged media entering the pipeline (spec §6.6). Attached media re-enters the deterministic gate subset before publish (DD-12, §14.5): limits, formatting, platform gates, cooldown. Carries the declared rights/source class needed by the media cooldown and visual gate.

file_ref.description: CONTENT_HOME-relative reference to the media file. Absolute paths are forbidden in any artifact.

brand.description: Brand id the media is intended for.

source_class.description: Declared rights/source class for the asset, driving cooldown identity and rights handling.

rights_declaration.description: Optional freeform statement of the rights/provenance the operator declares for the asset.

slot_ref.description: Optional binding to a calendar slot.

content_id.description: Optional binding to an in-flight content id (e.g. attaching media to a card awaiting media).

alt_text.description: Optional alt text supplied with the media.

attached_by.description: Optional identifier of the reviewer/operator who staged or attached the media.

attached_at.description: When the media was staged or attached.
